notes: Final clearance & handover after remediation. Show verification/documentation only (air sampling, particle counter, moisture meter, HEPA air scrubber, handover report). Bright, clean, trustworthy. Australian, metric. No on-image text, no logos, no patients.

images.context: Course hero — post-remediation air sampling for final clearance and handover
images.prompt: A restoration professional in nitrile gloves conducting post-remediation air sampling for final clearance in a bright, freshly restored Australian room, operating a calibrated air sampling pump on a tripod that draws air through a spore-trap collection cassette, a clipboard and handheld particle counter resting on a nearby bench. Clean, methodical, professional, soft natural daylight. Realistic photography, mid-distance framing.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no patients, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no visible mould or damage, no US power outlets, no imperial-only units

images.context: Module 2 & 4 — air quality testing with particle counter and gas detector
images.prompt: Over-the-shoulder close-up of a technician's gloved hands holding a handheld airborne particle counter and a gas detector, taking indoor air quality readings in a clean, restored Australian interior, an air scrubber quietly running in the soft-focus background. Hands-on-task framing, precise and calm. Realistic photography.
